name: Tech Summit 2025

name: Art Exhibition Dhaka
description: An exclusive art exhibition showcasing works from talented local and international artists across various mediums.

description: A vibrant music festival featuring performances from popular local and international bands and artists.

description: A delightful food festival celebrating the rich culinary heritage of Bangladesh with dishes from every region.
